char_overview: Defensive specialist, gentle, suited for security and escort tasks.
char_looks: Short black hair. Brown eyes. Black top with outer belt, red scarf, yellow jacket at waist, olive work pants. 卡美洛, a shield retracted on left gauntlet, expands to one-meter barrier for deflecting and repelling attacks
char_flaws: Cannot say no, so she ends up cleaning up everyone else's messes.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-遥远的理想城: Constructs city-wall-like barrier that repels attacks, strength scaling with 灵力 output.
char_mission: Take on escort and security commissions, shielding every life entrusted to her.

char_relationships.贝尔金: Followed her out of 狩灵协会2科 the day she announced the 晨昏事务所. When others called it reckless, she saw conviction. Has never regretted that choice.
char_relationships.贝拉: Former 狩灵协会2科 colleague, knows 贝拉 speaks through action, not words. Their timing never clashes in the field.
char_relationships.菲利普: The new junior whose fire she never had at his age. His restlessness makes her smile, and she believes in him.
